audio_identity.overall_style: platformer soundtrack with improved audio over NES predecessor
distinctive_elements: tropical/jungle themed setting reflected in music

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Adventure Island
notes: Documentation available does not specify tempo, keys, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics per area. Sources mention 'amazing soundtrack by Yuzo Koshiro' and 'more varied soundtrack' compared to predecessor, but no technical musical parameters are documented. Game has 5 stages with 4 areas each (3 obstacle course areas + 1 boss battle per stage), but no per-area musical data is available in provided sources.
